title: Nicks+++
body:
![# 🏷️ Nicks+++ — Simple Nickname Command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75bab7d9e1cf3e4d7d2a84dc776cadaa0ea57c1e.png)

**Nicks+++** is a lightweight utility mod that lets players and server administrators easily change in-game display names using a simple command. Perfect for **servers, roleplay, events, moderation, and communities**. No heavy plugins or complicated setup required.

---

## ✨ Features

* ✅ Change display names instantly
* ✅ Works for both players and server console/admins
* ✅ Simple `/nick` command
* ✅ Lightweight and performance-friendly
* ✅ Server-friendly design
* ✅ Ideal for SMPs, minigames, and roleplay communities

---

## 📜 Command

```
/nick <name>
```

Changes the player’s in-game display nickname.
Admins can also execute the command from the server console.

---

## ⚠️ Nickname Guidelines

Please keep all nicknames **family-friendly and appropriate**.
Do **not** use:

* Offensive language
* Harassment or hate speech
* Inappropriate or harmful names

Server owners are responsible for moderation and proper usage.

---

## 💡 Why Use Minecraft Nicks?

Many servers need a quick, reliable nickname system.
Minecraft Nicks focuses on **simplicity, performance, and reliability**, making it a perfect drop-in solution for any multiplayer server.

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

* Multiplayer servers
* Vanilla-style gameplay
* Lightweight and stable

---

## ⭐ Support

Enjoying the mod? Consider:

* ⭐ Following the project
* ⭐ Leaving feedback
* ⭐ Reporting issues or suggestions
